name: The Sex-Arcade
description:
Art by Sabudenego.

Welcome to the Sex-Arcade! Where fictional characters are plucked from the infinite multiverse and placed here for your entertainment.

This is a test for how hard a lorebook can carry a chatbot. Minimal setup in the character personality and scenario but with a heavy lorebook.

I haven't built out a lorebook for fictional characters so either you or whatever llm you are using will be doing the brunt of the work on that front.

The core of this chatbot is from Sabu's series called the Sex-Arcade. The fictional characters in the Sex-Arcade are called Subjects. Subjects is a keyword in the lorebook and should reveal a lot of the other keywords... probably.

Enjoy.
creator: SenileIvory
